description: DHS social-media card on a pastel lavender, pink, and light-blue paper-texture background. The top-left corner has a fan of diagonal rainbow stripes (including the Progress Pride colors: black, brown, pink, white, blue) overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH.' Top-right reads 'DHS celebrates' with 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' in multicolor rainbow letters. Centered is a circular cropped photograph, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of an older man in a light-gray suit standing outdoors on a brick path in a garden, with one hand raised, and a small group of people behind him. Below is a large blue quotation-mark glyph and a block quote: "This year's Pride theme, 'Living Our Truth,' resonates deeply with us. The Secretary encouraged us to embrace our authentic selves, both within the Department and beyond. Building on last year's theme, 'Voices for Change,' we recognize that being true to ourselves is essential to creating a safe and welcoming environment." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and the text: 'Paul A. / Office of Intelligence & Analysis, Deputy Director of Workforce Well-Being / with DHS for 24+ Years.' Bottom-right shows the circular DHS seal accented with rainbow strokes.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "This year's Pride theme, 'Living Our Truth,' resonates deeply with us..."; Paul A., Office of Intelligence & Analysis, Deputy Director of Workforce Well-Being, with DHS for 24+ Years
